extension.summary: AI-search-enabled Fenlight fork with TMDb-backed results.
extension.description: A standalone Fenlight fork that adds Gemini-powered natural-language search while keeping TMDb as the source of truth for displayed results.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v1.0.7]: * Update the built-in default TMDb API key and keep the Restore Default TMDb API Key action aligned with the new bundled value.
[v1.0.5]: * Add support for up to three Gemini API keys with automatic fallback on rate-limit or quota-exhaustion responses so AI Search can keep working when one project hits its cap.
[v1.0.4]: * Teach Gemini intent parsing to preserve named people separately from generic keywords so movie AI searches can feed TMDb cast-aware discovery and better literal title/franchise handling.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.
